<summary>[规划中] 正在将服务器采购评估任务转化为万户级计划，明确评估配额、分解规则与回报周期。</summary>


```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[已完成] 服务器采购评估任务已转化为万户级计划，明确评估配额、分解规则与回报周期。",
  "updates": {
    "tumen_quota": "评估至少3家主要服务器供应商，每家供应商需覆盖库存匹配度、市场动态、合作历史、政策合规性及财务记录等五个维度。总目标是为采购部门提供一份包含至少3家供应商的综合采购推荐报告。",
    "decomposition_rule": "逐级1:10分解规则：万户负责整体供应商评估任务的协调与最终报告的生成。千户负责对单个供应商进行全面评估，包括所有五个维度的数据收集与初步分析。百户负责每个评估维度（如库存匹配度）的数据收集与初步整理。十户负责具体数据点的获取（如从库存系统获取服务器型号A的当前库存量）。",
    "reporting_cycle": "回报周期：万户每月提交最终综合评估报告。千户每两周提交单个供应商的评估进展与初步结论。百户每周提交其负责维度的详细数据与分析。十户每日提交原始数据收集日志。"
  }
}

updates.decomposition_rule: 逐级1:10分解规则：万户负责整体供应商评估任务的协调与最终报告的生成。千户负责对单个供应商进行全面评估，包括所有五个维度的数据收集与初步分析。百户负责每个评估维度（如库存匹配度）的数据收集与初步整理。十户负责具体数据点的获取（如从库存系统获取服务器型号A的当前库存量）。
updates.reporting_cycle: 回报周期：万户每月提交最终综合评估报告。千户每两周提交单个供应商的评估进展与初步结论。百户每周提交其负责维度的详细数据与分析。十户每日提交原始数据收集日志。

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 万户任务已按1:10分解为十个千户级子任务，准备流转至下一阶段。

mingghan_allocations.description: Check current server stock levels in the inventory system using `inventory_list_products` to identify available server categories/types.
Assess detailed server needs and current stock for specific server types using `inventory_get_product` based on identified categories.
Scan RSS news feeds for general vendor market developments and emerging trends using `rss_list_articles`.
Analyze specific news articles related to key server vendors identified from market scans using `rss_get_article`.
Identify potential server vendors from CRM customer or partner records using `crm_list_customers`.
Review detailed partnership history and interactions with identified vendors in CRM using `crm_get_customer`.
Retrieve relevant procurement policies and guidelines from the knowledge base using `kb_search`.
Extract specific server evaluation criteria and standards from knowledge base articles using `kb_get_article`.
Collect historical server procurement transaction records from the finance system using `finance_list_transactions`.
Analyze current budget availability and historical spending patterns for server procurement based on finance system data using `finance_list_transactions`.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

arban_allocations.title: Inventory Stock Check: Current Server Stock Levels
arban_allocations.description: Check the inventory system for current server stock levels to identify immediate availability.

arban_allocations.title: Inventory Needs Assessment: Server Requirements
arban_allocations.description: Assess server needs based on current stock and future projections to determine procurement quantity.

arban_allocations.title: Vendor Market News Scan: General Developments
arban_allocations.description: Scan general RSS news for broad vendor market developments, trends, and industry shifts.

arban_allocations.title: Vendor Market News Scan: Specific Vendor Updates
arban_allocations.description: Scan targeted RSS news for specific server vendor updates, major announcements, and financial health indicators.

arban_allocations.title: CRM Partnership History: Active Server Vendors
arban_allocations.description: Retrieve partnership history from CRM for currently active server vendors, including contract details and performance.

arban_allocations.title: CRM Partnership History: Potential Server Vendors
arban_allocations.description: Retrieve partnership history from CRM for potential new server vendors, assessing past engagements or relevant data.

arban_allocations.title: Procurement Policy Review: General Guidelines
arban_allocations.description: Review general procurement policies and guidelines related to server acquisition from the knowledge base.

arban_allocations.title: Evaluation Criteria Definition: Server Procurement
arban_allocations.description: Identify and define specific server vendor evaluation criteria from the knowledge base, focusing on technical and business aspects.

arban_allocations.title: Finance System Check: Allocated Budget
arban_allocations.description: Check the finance system for the allocated budget for server procurement.

arban_allocations.title: Finance System Check: Historical Procurement Records
arban_allocations.description: Retrieve historical server procurement records from the finance system to understand past spending and vendor performance.

updates.readiness: 所有10个十户级单位已动员并准备接收任务。
